clauses.statement: collectJudgmentItems gathers spine subchecks, judgment axis nodes (with the original decision_question), and failure mode candidates from a gate DAG only when the route is agent_workflow or the change profile is workflow_heavy; on other routes it returns an empty list.

adjudicate prepare --judgment reads the latest pr-prepare.json, collects the active judgment items, and writes judgment-adjudication-request.md containing each item's original question, mechanical discharge status, matched evidence, the changed file list, the three-verdict vocabulary, and the instruction that token or wording matches alone must never justify judged_sound.
adjudicate prepare --judgment fails with an explicit error, without producing any artifact, when no pr prepare artifact exists or when the route yields zero active judgment items.

recordJudgmentAdjudication rejects verdicts outside judged_sound/judged_unsound/needs_human_judgment, blank reasons, and missing provenance, binds each accepted verdict to the current HEAD commit, and refuses to record when HEAD cannot be resolved.

The gate:judgment_dag_adjudication node reports needs_evidence and lists the missing item ids when adjudication records are absent, bound to a stale HEAD, or missing for some active items; verdicts without a head_commit or evaluated without a resolvable HEAD are treated as missing (fail closed).

When any item's current-head verdict is judged_unsound the gate fails and its reason carries the judge's reasoning; needs_human_judgment items resolve only through an accepted decision record with source gate:judgment_dag_adjudication:<item-id>, a reason, and an artifact.

When every active item is resolved by a current-head judged_sound verdict or an accepted human decision the gate passes, and when zero items are active the gate reports an explicit not_applicable instead of a silent pass.

gate:judgment_dag_adjudication participates in pr prepare as a required gate registered in the unresolved-required whitelist and the critical-gate set, so ready_for_pr_create stays false and a reason-only waiver cannot pass it while the gate is unresolved.
Setting judgment_adjudication.enabled to false in .vibepro/config.json suppresses the gate entirely, and pr prepare completes without crashing in repositories that have no adjudication artifacts.
